chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 779 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.11.2022 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Ghulam Murtaza Sario, Assistant Engineer, Provincial Highways, Sub-Division Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Learned A.A.G., Sindh files further comments of respondents No.4 & 5 along with photographs, and states that reconditioning/widening of Old National Highway passing through Ali Wahan Rohri has already been completed as motorable during 2019- 2020 as dual carriageway along with dividing wall plus storm drain on both sides of road. The comments are taken on record. It appears that instant petition has served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
